sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 102

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 102:1
items.html:
(to the question) Shena [sleep]
When the Partzuf rises in the secret of MAN, it is discerned, in its own place, as being in the secret of sleep — meaning the departure of the Mochin, in such a way that there remains within it a discernment of Kista de Chayuta. See Answer 94. (p. 809, Item 106; and p. 810, Item 108)
